data.title: 国际服主线Vol.EX 第二章 Part1更新
data.summary: [Main Story Announcement] The Main Story Ex. Decagrammaton Chapter 2, Part 1, is set to be released!
data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

The Main Story Ex. Decagrammaton Chapter 2, Part 1, is set to be released!
Decagrammaton—who are they, and what is their purpose?
